TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Takofan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 359 buwan, 1,048 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 55% kyan ku 578 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 45% kyan ku 470 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 52%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takofan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Takofan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Takofan hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Takofan hya' ga Chishang. tay mkyahu' na Takofan hya' ga Parupu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tako*an …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ku ĒaŇč s~…ēaŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a kano …£o. taj mkraja Ē na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßis~…ēńßaŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a parupu. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Takofan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 359 buwan, 1,048 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 55% kyan ku 578 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 45% kyan ku 470 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 52%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takofan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Takofan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Takofan hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Takofan hya' ga Chishang. tay mkyahu' na Takofan hya' ga Parupu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tako*an …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ku ĒaŇč s~…ēaŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a kano …£o. taj mkraja Ē na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßis~…ēńßaŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na tako*an ńßja Ē …£a parupu. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
